settings.heading: Manuals and setup guides
settings.copy: Find quick-start instructions, user guides, and setup notes by product family.

settings.heading: Manuals and setup guidance by product family
settings.copy: Browse setup guides by product family, setup stage, or the kind of answer you need right now.
settings.source_note: Start with the guide that matches your product and setup stage, then move into troubleshooting or contact support only if needed.

settings.title: Quick-start guides
settings.copy: Start with the essentials: connection steps, first-use setup, and the key product notes most customers need first.

settings.title: Full user guides
settings.copy: Review complete documentation, features, and deeper usage guidance for the product or workflow.

settings.title: Setup notes
settings.copy: Open product-specific setup notes and advanced guidance for displays, power delivery, or more complex workflows.

settings.heading: Need another step after the manual?
settings.copy: If a guide does not fully resolve the setup, move into troubleshooting, compatibility, or direct support.
